product_name: kingston 32gb 5600mt/s ddr5 non-ecc cl46 sodimm 2rx8
product_description:
Information about a specific computer memory unit. Let's analyze the details:
Capacity: The capacity of the memory module I mentioned is 32GB. This means it can store 32GB of data.
Speed: Operates at 5600 mega moves per second (MT/s). This is the data transfer rate in memory, which indicates how quickly data can be read and written.
DDR5: DDR5 stands for Double Data Rate 5. It is a type of synchronous dynamic random access memory (SDRAM) used in computers. DDR5 memory is faster and more energy efficient compared to its predecessors like DDR4.
Non-ECC: Non-ECC stands for Non-Error Correction Code. ECC memory is used in some systems to detect and correct errors in data. On the other hand, non-ECC memory does not have this error correction capability. It is commonly used in consumer computers.
CL46: CL (CAS Response Time) is a measure of the delay between when the memory controller requests data and when it is available. CL46 indicates relatively high latency, which may affect memory performance.
SODIMM: SODIMM stands for Small Outline Double Outline Inline Memory Module. These are smaller memory modules commonly used in laptops and smaller computers.
2Rx8: This refers to the organization of the memory module. "2Rx8" means the unit has two ranks and uses x8 (8-bit) components. This information is important for compatibility with your computer's memory slots.
In short, Kingston 32GB 5600MT/s DDR5 Non-ECC CL46 SODIMM 2Rx8 is a 32GB high data rate laptop memory module.

ECC: This RAM module is described as "non-ECC," which means it does not support Error Correcting Code (ECC) functionality. ECC RAM is typically used in server environments where data accuracy is critical.

SODIMM: This stands for "small, dual-disk inline memory module". SODIMMs are smaller and mainly used in laptops and smaller computers, while standard DIMMs are used in desktop computers.
1Rx8: This designation refers to the organization of memory modules on a RAM chip. In this case, it means that the module contains one rank (1R) and eight memory chips (8). The number of ranks and segments can affect memory performance and compatibility in some cases.
This RAM module is a high-capacity DDR5 SODIMM with a relatively high CAS latency (CL46), making it suitable for laptops and systems that require a large amount of memory for tasks such as gaming, content creation, or running virtual machines. . SODIMM: This stands for "small, dual-disk inline memory module." SODIMMs are smaller memory modules commonly used in laptops, compact desktop computers, and other devices with limited space.
1Rx8: This part refers to the memory segment arrangement of the memory module. "1Rx8" indicates that the module has one rank of memory chips on the module (1Rx) and that each chip has 8 memory banks (8). This information is important for memory compatibility and performance considerations.
Briefly, the information provided describes a 16GB DDR4 SODIMM with a speed of 3200MT/s, a CAS response time of 22, and is non-ECC capable (lack of error correction). It is probably designed for use in laptops or smaller computers. Keep in mind that memory specifications are important when upgrading or replacing memory in your computer, so make sure it matches your system requirements before purchasing.

product_name: lg 29wq600-w 29" ips ultra wide full hd hdr10 rgb 99% usb type-c amd free sync / built in speakers
product_description:
LG's 29WQ600 monitor features 178° wide viewing angles and consistent colors covering the entire sRGB color space, thanks to its IPS panel.
The standard color space for Windows applications is sRGB, even though there are displays with a wider gamut offering more vibrant colors at this price range. SDR content won't be over-saturated - in fact, it will be closer to the creator's intent.
It is suitable for entry-level color-critical work, but if you are a professional colorist, you will need a display with more strict factory calibration or a colorimeter.
IPS monitors can also suffer from IPS glow, which is characterized by visible glowing around the corners. In a dark room with a high brightness setting, it's mostly noticeable when displaying dark content.
With a peak brightness of 250-nits, the LG 29WQ600 is able to get more than bright enough under normal lighting conditions for most users. Even at its highest brightness setting, the LG 29WQ600 might still be too dim for you if you're in an exceptionally well-lit room because it won't be able to reduce glare.
The 2560×1080 resolution results in a pixel density of 95.81 PPI (pixels per inch), which means you get a fair amount of screen real estate with decent text and detail clarity.
Compared to 60Hz and 75Hz displays, the LG 29WQ600 has a maximum refresh rate of 100Hz.
It's around 90FPS that fast-paced games start feeling smooth and responsive, so the difference between 75Hz and 100Hz is more noticeable than the difference between 100Hz and 144Hz.
Also, the LG 29WQ600 offers tear-free video playback at up to 100FPS thanks to its variable refresh rate (VRR). This device supports LFC (Low Framerate Compensation) with a VRR range of 40-100Hz. In order to avoid tearing at 39FPS, the refresh rate is multiplied by 78Hz.
VRR is supported over DisplayPort by NVIDIA cards without requiring official G-SYNC certification, while AMD FreeSync works over HDMI and DisplayPort.
Additionally, the LG 29WQ600 supports Motion Blur Reduction, which reduces perceived motion blur at the cost of picture brightness. A refresh rate of at least 75Hz is needed for it to work at the same time as VRR.
There's no obvious ghosting behind fast-moving objects due to the specified pixel response time speed of 5ms (GtG).
Four response time overdrive modes are available: Off, Normal, Fast and Ultrafast.. Faster is recommended as it does not introduce 'Fast' hosting.
There is an integrated low-blue light filter (the 'Reader' mode) and the monitor's backlight does not flicker (unless MBR is enabled).

The LG 32MR50C-B brings your digital content to life by wrapping the screen around your field of vision. And when your workout is over, chill out and recharge in Relax Mode by choosing one of five peaceful sounds, like gentle ocean waves or a crackling wood fire.

product_name: one mic clip wireless with one receiver k35
product_description:
One wireless microphone and one receiver. Provide some general information about how this setting works.
A wireless microphone system typically consists of three main components:
Microphone transmitter: This is the component that picks up sound using the microphone capsule and transmits it wirelessly to the receiver. The microphone transmitter can be attached to clothing or hand-held, depending on the design.
Receiver: The receiver picks up the audio signal sent by the microphone transmitter. It then converts the signal back into an audio format that can be sent to an amplifier, mixer, or directly to a speaker system.
Microphone clip: This is an accessory used to secure the microphone transmitter to a piece of clothing, usually worn by the person speaking.
For setup, if you have one wireless microphone and one receiver, you'll typically do the following:
Attach the microphone transmitter to the person who will be speaking, using the microphone clip to secure it to their clothing.
Place the receiver within range of the transmitter and connect it to your audio system, such as a mixer or amplifier.
Once everything is set up, the microphone should transmit the sound wirelessly to the receiver, which will then output it to your sound system.

product_name: tp-link tg-3468 gigabit pci express network adapter
product_description:
The TP-Link TG-3468 Gigabit PCI Express Network Adapter is a reliable and high-performance networking solution designed to upgrade your desktop computer to Gigabit Ethernet connectivity. It provides a stable, high-speed wired connection, making it ideal for demanding applications such as HD video streaming, online gaming, and large file transfers. Here’s a detailed description of its key features and specifications:
Key Features:
Gigabit Ethernet Speed:
Supports 10/100/1000 Mbps Ethernet speeds, ensuring fast and reliable wired connections for all your network needs. The Gigabit Ethernet connection provides a significant speed boost compared to standard Ethernet, making it ideal for high-bandwidth activities.
PCI Express Interface:
The adapter connects to a PCI Express slot on your desktop computer, offering a stable and secure connection. The PCIe interface ensures optimal performance and compatibility with a wide range of desktop systems.
Auto-Negotiation:
Supports auto-negotiation of 10/100/1000 Mbps speeds, allowing the adapter to automatically adjust to the highest possible speed based on the network conditions. This ensures seamless and efficient network performance.
Wake-on-LAN:
Features Wake-on-LAN (WoL) support, enabling you to remotely wake up your computer from a low-power state. This is particularly useful for remote management and maintenance tasks.
Flow Control:
Supports IEEE 802.3x Flow Control for full-duplex mode and backpressure for half-duplex mode, providing reliable data transfer and minimizing data loss during network congestion.
Low Profile and Standard Bracket:
Includes both a standard bracket and a low-profile bracket, making it compatible with both standard and slim desktop cases. This flexibility ensures the adapter can be used in a variety of system configurations.
Easy Installation:
Simple to install with plug-and-play functionality. The adapter comes with a setup CD containing drivers and a user manual, making the installation process straightforward and user-friendly.
Specifications:
Standards and Protocols: IEEE 802.3, IEEE 802.3u, IEEE 802.3ab
Interface: PCI Express
Data Rate: 10/100/1000 Mbps
Connector: 1 x RJ-45
Network Media:
10BASE-T: UTP category 3, 4, 5 cable (maximum 100 meters)
100BASE-TX: UTP category 5, 5e cable (maximum 100 meters)
1000BASE-T: UTP category 5, 5e, 6 or above cable (maximum 100 meters)
LED Indicators: Yes
Dimensions: 4.8 x 3.1 x 0.8 inches (121 x 78.5 x 21.5 mm)
Operating Systems: Windows 10/8.1/8/7/XP, Linux

It appears you're referring to a UGREEN CAT6 Ethernet RJ45 extension cable with a male/female connector and a length of 5 meters. Here's what this product description typically means:
UGREEN: UGREEN is a brand that manufactures various electronic accessories and cables, including Ethernet cables and adapters.
CAT6: This indicates that the cable is Category 6 Ethernet cable, which is designed to handle data transfer speeds up to 1 Gbps (Gigabit per second) over short distances. CAT6 cables are commonly used for home and small business networks.

Ethernet RJ45: This indicates that the cable has RJ45 connectors on both ends. RJ45 connectors are commonly used for Ethernet connections.
Extension Male/Female: The cable appears to have a male connector on one end and a female connector on the other end. This setup is typically used for extending an existing Ethernet cable. The male end can be plugged into an existing Ethernet cable, and the female end can then accept another Ethernet cable to extend the overall length.
5M: This specifies the length of the cable, which is 5 meters. This length allows you to extend an Ethernet connection by 5 meters.
So, in summary, the UGREEN CAT6 F/UTP Ethernet RJ45 extension male/female 5M cable is designed to extend an Ethernet connection by 5 meters while providing moderate protection against electromagnetic interference. It's commonly used in networking setups where you need to connect devices over a longer distance than your existing Ethernet cable allows.

Power Budget According to Cable Length
Ideally, shorter cable would use less power because of less power degradation over their length; this is not the case with most devices as they will use the same amount of power across the cable regardless of the length.
The auto features of this gigabit switch make installation plug and play and hassle-free. No configuring is required. Auto MDI/MDIX eliminate the need for crossover cables. Auto-negotiation on each port senses the link speed of a network device (either 10, 100, or 1000 Mbps) and intelligently adjusts for compatibility and optimal performance.
* Maximum power savings when compared to a TP-LINK conventional switch, the real saving rate may vary based on the usage condition.

product_name: ugreen vga to hdmi adapter (vga male to hdmi female converter) - 50945
product_description:
The UGREEN VGA to HDMI Adapter is a device that allows you to convert a VGA signal from a source device (such as a computer or laptop) to an HDMI signal, which is commonly used for newer displays, TVs, or monitors.
Here's a breakdown of the components mentioned:
VGA (Video Graphics Array): This is an analog video standard commonly used to connect computers to monitors or displays. It's been around for a long time and is gradually being replaced by digital standards like HDMI and DisplayPort.
HDMI (High Definition Multimedia Interface): This is a digital video and audio interface standard used for transmitting uncompressed video and compressed or uncompressed digital audio data from an HDMI-compliant source device, such as a display controller, to a compatible computer monitor, video projector, digital television, or digital audio device.
Adapter: An adapter is a device that allows you to connect two different types of connectors or cables. In this case, the UGREEN VGA to HDMI Adapter allows you to connect a VGA cable (usually found on older computers) to an HDMI port (commonly found on modern displays).
Male and Female Connectors: The terms "male" and "female" refer to the physical design of the connectors. In this context, the VGA connector on the adapter is male, meaning it has pins that plug into a female VGA port on your computer. The HDMI connector on the adapter is female, meaning it accepts a male HDMI cable that you would connect to your display.
Overall, this adapter is useful for situations where you need to connect a device with a VGA output to a display or monitor that only accepts HDMI inputs.

product_name: haing usb 3.0 sata iii 2.5 hdd enclosure
product_description:
USB 3.0 to SATA III 2.5 inch Hard Drive Enclosure. This type of enclosure allows you to connect a 2.5-inch SATA hard disk drive (HDD) or solid-state drive (SSD) to your computer via a USB 3.0 connection. This can be a convenient way to add additional storage space to your computer or use an internal hard drive as an external drive.
Here are some tips for using the can:
Installation: You will usually need to open the case, connect the SATA drive to the SATA connector inside the case, and then close the case. Make sure it is closed securely.
Connection: Once your drive is installed, connect the chassis to your computer using a USB 3.0 cable. This will usually provide both data and power to the drive.
Compatibility: Make sure your drive and case are compatible. The box should specify the types of drives (HDD or SSD) and the sizes they support (for example, up to 2TB).
Performance: USB 3.0 offers fast data transfer speeds, so you should see good performance if you're using an SSD. Hard drives may have slower speeds due to mechanical limitations.
Safety: Always safely remove the drive from your computer before disconnecting it to avoid data loss or damage.
Care: Keep the case in a safe place to protect your drive from physical damage. Avoid dropping or exposing the case to extreme temperatures.
Backup: If you use the drive to store data, it's a good idea to have a backup of your data elsewhere.
If you experience any issues with the enclosure, such as the drive not being recognized by your computer, check the connections and make sure the drive is installed correctly. You may also want to test the drive in a different enclosure or directly on a computer to rule out issues with the drive itself.

product_name: canon i-sensys lbp6030b - laser printers
product_description:
The Canon i-SENSYS LBP6030B is a compact and efficient monochrome laser printer designed for small office and home office use. Its primary focus is on delivering high-quality prints at an affordable cost. Here’s a detailed description of its features and specifications:
Compact Design and Ease of Use
The Canon i-SENSYS LBP6030B is known for its space-saving design. Measuring approximately 364 mm (W) x 249 mm (D) x 199 mm (H) and weighing about 5.0 kg, it fits easily into tight spaces, making it ideal for small offices or personal desks. The sleek black exterior adds a professional touch to any workspace.
High-Quality Printing
This printer delivers sharp and clear text and graphics with a print resolution of up to 2400 x 600 dpi (with Automatic Image Refinement). It uses laser beam printing technology, ensuring consistent and precise prints. The Canon Advanced Printing Technology (CAPT) and High Smart Compression Architecture (Hi-SCoA) help in processing data faster, resulting in quick and efficient printing.
Performance and Speed
The LBP6030B offers impressive print speeds of up to 18 pages per minute (ppm) for A4-sized documents. The first printout time is approximately 7.8 seconds, minimizing wait times and enhancing productivity. Its monthly duty cycle is up to 5,000 pages, making it suitable for moderate to heavy use.
Paper Handling and Media Types
This printer supports various media types, including plain paper, heavy paper, transparency, label, index card, and envelope. The input tray has a capacity of 150 sheets, and the output tray can hold up to 100 sheets. It accommodates different paper sizes, such as A4, A5, B5, Legal, Letter, Executive, 16K, and envelopes (COM10, Monarch, DL, C5).
Energy Efficiency and Environmental Features
Canon i-SENSYS LBP6030B is designed with energy efficiency in mind. It features Canon’s On-Demand Fixing technology, which heats up instantly, reducing power consumption without compromising performance. The printer has an Energy Star certification, ensuring it meets strict energy efficiency guidelines. The typical energy consumption (TEC) is approximately 0.48 kWh per week, contributing to lower energy costs.
Connectivity and Compatibility
The LBP6030B connects to your computer via a high-speed USB 2.0 interface, ensuring reliable and fast data transfer. It is compatible with various operating systems, including Windows (Windows 8, Windows 7, Windows Vista, Windows XP), Mac OS, and Linux, providing versatility across different platforms.
Maintenance and Toner Cartridge
This printer uses the Canon Cartridge 725, which integrates the toner, drum, and other essential components into a single unit, making it easy to replace and maintain. The cartridge yields approximately 1,600 pages, ensuring a reasonable cost per page. The all-in-one design of the cartridge ensures consistent print quality and reduces maintenance needs.
Additional Features
Quiet Operation: The LBP6030B operates quietly, making it suitable for environments where noise is a concern.
User-Friendly Software: The printer comes with Canon's user-friendly software suite, which includes drivers and utilities for easy setup and management.
Durable Build: Built with high-quality materials, the LBP6030B is designed to withstand regular use and provide reliable performance over time.
In summary, the Canon i-SENSYS LBP6030B is a reliable and cost-effective monochrome laser printer ideal for small offices and home use. Its compact design, high-quality output, efficient performance, and energy-saving features make it a great choice for users looking for an affordable and dependable printing solution.

product_name: tp-link tapo l530e smart wi-fi multicolor light bulb
product_description:
The TP-Link Tapo L530E Smart Wi-Fi Multicolor Light Bulb offers a range of features designed to enhance your smart home experience. Here are some of its key specifications and features:
Multicolor Options: The bulb allows you to choose from 16,000,000 hues, enabling you to create scenarios for your daily routine or special activities by customizing brightness, light temperature, and colors.
Brightness and Energy Efficiency: It's a 60-watt equivalent LED bulb, producing up to 806 lumens of white brightness. The bulb is dimmable, ranging from 1% to 100% brightness. Despite its brightness, it is energy efficient, using only 8.3 watts for 806 lumens (60 W equivalent).
Smart Features: The bulb supports voice control through Amazon Alexa and Google Assistant. It can be controlled remotely via the Tapo app, and it doesn't require a hub to connect to your home Wi-Fi network.
Convenience and Control: It offers features like preset settings for different scenarios (like movie nights), schedules and timers, sunrise and sunset modes, and an Away Mode that simulates someone being at home. The bulb also restores its last light state after being powered off.
Compatibility and Setup: The bulb is compatible with iOS 9.0 or higher and Android 4.3 or higher. The setup is straightforward using the Tapo app.
This smart bulb is designed to provide both functional and ambient lighting, with easy control and customization to suit your lifestyle. It's ideal for various scenarios like theater settings, fine dinners, parties, or gaming, enhancing your home with immersive lighting.
Easily design scenarios for your daily routine or special activities by customizing brightness, colour temperature (2,500-6,500 K), and colours—with 16,000,000 hues to choose from.
The Tapo smart bulb installs as easily as a standard light bulb, follow the guide, enjoy your new smart bulb within 2 minutes!

product_name: microsoft windows 11 home 64b eng dsp
product_description:
Windows 11 operating system. Let me break down what this description means:
Microsoft: This indicates that the operating system is developed by Microsoft, a well-known technology company.
Windows 11: This is the name of the operating system version. Windows 11 is the successor to Windows 10 and was officially announced by Microsoft in June 2021. It includes many new features and a redesigned user interface.
Home: This refers to the version of Windows 11. “Home” versions of Windows are typically designed for home users and offer a basic set of features compared to more advanced versions like “Pro” or “Enterprise.”
64B: This indicates that the operating system is designed for 64-bit computer systems. 64-bit versions of Windows can take advantage of more RAM and are generally better able to handle modern programs and tasks.
Eng: means English, which indicates that the operating system is in English.
DSP: This stands for “Delivery Service Partner” or “Delivery Service Package”. In the context of the Windows product description, this may indicate that this is a version of Windows 11 that comes with specific delivery or service features.
If you're considering purchasing or using this version of Windows 11, make sure it meets your needs and is compatible with your PC hardware. Additionally, keep in mind that software product names and versions may change over time, so it's a good idea to check the latest information and updates from Microsoft.

product_description:
Apple Pencil (2nd generation) delivers pixel-perfect precision and industry-leading low latency, making it great for drawing, sketching, colouring, taking notes, marking up PDFs and more. And it’s as easy and natural to use as a pencil.
Apple Pencil (2nd generation) also allows you to change tools without setting it down, thanks to its intuitive touch surface that supports double-tapping. And it pairs, charges and stores magnetically on the side of your iPad.
Apple Pencil (2nd generation) supports Apple Pencil hover¹ when used with iPad Pro 12.9-inch (6th generation) and iPad Pro 11-inch (4th generation).• TECHNICAL SPECS:

product_name: thermal grizzly cleaning wipes 1 pack, cleaning cloths for surfaces w/ thermal conductive materials
product_description:
Clean and degreased surfaces are important so that thermal conductive materials such as thermal pastes or liquid metal can adhere well and thus develop their full thermal conductivity. This is where TG Cleaning Wipes come into play: cleaning cloths for cleaning surfaces. TG Cleaning Wipes contain ten double packs, each with two dry wipes and two wet wipes optimized for removing thermal paste residues.
First, stubborn dirt is removed with a dry wipe before the surface is cleaned with the two wet wipes. In the third cleaning step, the surface is dried and then wiped with a fresh dry cloth.
Assembly aids such as the TG Kapton Insulation Sheet or the TG Shield protective coating also adhere better to cleaned surfaces. TG Cleaning Wipes are available as a practical complete set of 40 cleaning wipes, which are packaged in ten double packs of two dry wipes and two wet wipes.

product_name: thermal grizzly amd am5 aluminum contact sealing frame cpu socket secure frame, protects the exposed components of the ryzen 7000/8000/9000 cpus.
product_description:
Combination of contact frame and CPU guardThe AM5 Contact & Sealing Frame is a combination of Contact Frame and CPU-Guard for AMD's Ryzen-7000 processors. As a Contact Frame, the AM5 Contact & Sealing Frame creates optimal contact pressure of the CPU into the socket, while an optional, included inlay made of silicone foam serves to protect the exposed components on the CPU.
Optimized Inner Contour for Even Pressure DistributionThe precision-milled inner contour of the AM5 Contact & Sealing Frame creates multiple contact points to the heatspreader compared to the standard SAM. These contact points distribute the contact pressure on the CPU evenly. This ensures that the contact surfaces of the CPU rest uniformly on the pins of the socket. For example, problems with the detection of system memory can be avoided this way.
Innovative Silicone Foam Inlay for Protection and SealingThe AM5 Contact & Sealing Frame comes with a silicone foam inlay. This can be placed on the PCB of the processor, similar to the AMD Ryzen 7000 CPU Guard. When installing the AM5 Contact & Sealing Frame, the gap between the heatspreader and the aluminium frame is sealed by the silicone foam by pressing the foam onto the PCB. This prevents thermal paste or liquid metal from getting onto the CPU's unprotected components. The foam inlay is optional when used with thermal pastes, but mandatory when used with liquid metal.
User-Friendly Assembly with Clear Marking and CompatibilityTo simplify installation, there is a corresponding marking on the top of the AM5 Contact & Sealing Frame. Since the socket has a bulge on the upper - the "northern" - edge, mounting is only possible in one orientation. Four screws are included for mounting the frame and compatibility with the Thermal Grizzly AM5 backplates is given

product_name: thermal grizzly kryosheet (38 x 38 mm - 0.2 mm) high performance thermal pads, excellent alternative for thermal pastes
product_description:
The graphene thermal pads of the Thermal Grizzly KryoSheet series can be used as an excellent alternative for thermal compounds from the higher performance segment. Similar to Carbonaut pads, they have a conformable surface with very high thermal conductivity. Compared to Carbonaut pads, KryoSheet as a high-end product offers significantly higher thermal conductivity. This increased thermal conductivity is not only due to the choice of material, but also to the innovative manufacturing process. KryoSheet does not contain any liquid components and is therefore not subject to normal ageing as is the case with traditional thermal paste. Drying out is not possible.
The KryoSheet graphene pads have a molecular structure stacked in the Z-direction. This optimised structure enables outstanding and constant thermal conductivity. This is due to a specially developed manufacturing process in which the hexagonal crystal structure of the graphite is broken up along the basal plane in order to exploit the anisotropy of the graphite's thermal conductivity. However, as a side effect of this complex manufacturing process, the electrical conductivity is also increased and the stability of the KryoSheet pads is affected, so that the pads should only be used according to instructions!
Multiple use of KryoSheet is not recommended!
When dismantling the cooler and handling the KryoSheet after use, microcracks may occur in the structure of the graphene pads, which may impair performance.
KryoSheet is available pre-cut in various standard CPU/GPU sizes, such as:
KryoSheet 33 x 33 mm Compatibility
Note: Multiple use of KryoSheet is not recommended!When dismantling the cooler and handling the KryoSheet after use, microcracks may occur in the structure of the graphene pads, which may impair Performance.

product_name: thermal grizzly hydronaut 1.5ml (3.9g) excellent price-performance thermal paste w/ 11.8 (w/m.k) excellent conductivity
product_description:
Hydronaut can be used for overclocking due to it's excellent thermal conductivity, but it was created specifically for users with larger-scale cooling solutions, who are looking for a quality product with an excellent price-performance ratio, for example for their water cooling system.
The Hydronaut thermal grease delivers optimal heat transfer capabilities for larger-scale cooling solutions like water cooling systems.
Hydronaut thermal grease consists of a silicon-free structure. The makes it very light and highly flexible and easy to apply.
Hydronaut achieves best results if used on medium- to large-scale cooling solutions. This product is ROHS-compliant for demanding users.

product_name: hyte y70 standard edition (non-touch) dual chamber atx mid tower modern aesthetic gaming case, enhanced edition, panoramic tempered glass design, w/ pcie 4.0 riser cable (taro milk)
product_description:
Spilt Milk Has Never Looked So Good (Milky Y70's Only)
Soft and creamy colors soak Y70 in a sweet & delicious fresh style. Strawberry Milk, Blueberry Milk, and Taro Milk flavors have arrived! Milky canopies are included for uninterrupted visual flow.
Massive 4 Slot Vertical Graphics
Y70 grows GPU support to 4 slots with additional airflow space between the edge of the card and the glass. This means you can fit even the largest and most powerful of graphics cards into your build with ease. Additionally, the cold floor cooling down below can house up to a trio of 120mm or duo of 140mm fans up to 32mm thick to direct fresh airflow straight into the GPU.
Included Luxury PCIE 4.0 Riser Cable
Included with the case is a luxury PCIE 4.0 x 16 riser with a color-matched canopy for uninterrupted visual flow that'll make for a painless GPU installation and build process. It also allows for a plethora of half-height PCIE cards to sit behind the throne of the vertical graphics.
Ginormous Cooling Capacity
A spacious interior makes room for up to a 360mm long & 125mm thick radiator on the side and adjustable top bracket that can house another 360mm radiator up to 68mm thick up above. Working together with the cold floor cooling at the bottom and spot for an additional fan at the rear of the case, Y70 has a total capacity of 10 fans in a fully populated chassis. With over 180mm of clearance to the side glass, air and water cooling enthusiasts alike will appreciate the flexibility afforded to them by the chassis to create the most robust cooling configurations possible.
Unified Modern Aesthetic
With 4 unique colorways, Y70 puts your build front and center with a beautifully crafted 3-piece panoramic glass which serves as a window into the heart of your PC. The dual chamber interior layout keeps the front looking great while giving you plenty of space to manage cables in the back, especially with the help of our seamless L-shaped molded rubber grommet, meticulously placed cable routing channels & tie-down points, and reusable Velcro straps. All easily accessible with tool-less top and side panels alongside floating storage sleds that eject from the rear of the case for intuitive drive maintenance.

product_name: cooler master masterbox td500 mesh v2 (white) argb mid tower tempered glass gaming case w/ 3 x120mm argb fan & usb type c
product_description:
Features:
MasterBox TD500 Mesh V2’s iconic polygonal design keeps your system looking unique and your gaming sessions streamlined.
FineMesh Performance Front Panel
Polygonal FineMesh features a 3D contour and is also capable of simultaneously providing high airflow and dust filtration.
Available in both Black & White colorations
MasterBox TD500 Mesh V2 is available in both black so you can choose the color that best matches your setup!
Three CF120 ARGB Fans Included
Pre-installed CF120 ARGB fans provide ample airflow, ensuring low temperatures, high performance, and eye-catching aesthetics during even the most intense gaming sessions.
USB 3.2 Gen 2 Type C Support
USB 3.2 Gen 2 Type C port built into the I/O panel allows multi-purpose, streamlined data transmission.
ARGB/FAN HUB Included
The included controller allows users to manage systems lighting independently from the hardware configuration and provides the user with 4 additional fan headers in case of need.
Removable Top Panel
The top panel is entirely removable for improved access during assembly and ease of mounting of cooling solutions.
Tool-Free Crystalline TG Side Panel
Featuring a crystalline tempered glass side panel, completely toolless for quick access to the internals.
Versatile Cooling Options
Support for up to seven 120mm fans and 360mm front and top radiator support ensure that performance is not compromised.
PSU Shroud With Removable Cover
MasterBox TD500 Mesh V2’s removable PSU cover allows users to freely decide whether to showcase or keep their PSUs hidden.
Hardware Compatibility
MasterBox TD500Mesh V2 is natively compatible with ITX, M-ATX and ATX motherboards.E-ATX motherboards, such as SSI-CEB models, are compatible with dimensions up to 12" x 10.7".

product_description: • Samsung's Odyssey OLED G8 Gaming Monitor brings content to life with 4K UHD OLED.• Images shine with 250 nits of brightness and a wider spectrum of colors, shades, and contrasts.• 240Hz refresh rate, and 0.03ms response time (GtG) allow near-instant response to stay ahead of the competition, and G-Sync compatibility keeps the GPU and panel synced up to eliminate choppiness, screen-lag, and image tears.• New OLED Safeguard+ – including Dynamic Cooling & Thermal Modulation systems – helps prevent burn-in.• OLED Glare-free technology significantly reduces glare, and the Dynamic Black Equalizer analyzes and adjusts sharpness, saturation, and black details.• Gaming Hub provides instant access to streaming platforms and gaming consoles, or watch your favorite shows with Smart TV apps.• Sleek metal design with height-adjustable screen swivels and tilts for total gaming comfort, and the Easy Setup Stand enables installation of the monitor with no tools or screws.• 3-Year warranty.

product_description:
Displayport to HDMI Cable: Uni-directional DisplayPort to HDMI converter for UHD video and audio streaming from a computer to a HDTV, monitor, projector. Enjoy a bigger screen visual feast. It is not bi-directional: not support HDMI to DP.
4K UHD Resolution: Supports 4Kx2K @30Hz, enjoy home theater with 4K high resolution. Plug and play, no driver needed. Easily show movies on a big-screen HDTV, present work on a projector, or create/configure a second monitor or mirrored displays.
Audio Video Sync: DP to HDMI adapter cable transmits high-definition video and audio simultaneously from your computer to an HDTV for video streaming or gaming.
Reliable Connectivity: Gold-plated connectors, tinned copper wire, aluminum foil and braid, durable PVC case, ensure a strength connectivity between devices without signal loss.
Mirror or Extend your Computer: Under mirror mode, you could view your laptop or desktop's screen or video on display or TV, easily play games or movies to TV; under extend mode, you could connect a second monitor to computer, to give them a larger desktop on which to work.
The UGREEN 3M Displayport Male to HDMI Male Cable delivers impressive 4K UHD video quality at 60Hz. This level of resolution ensures stunning clarity and detail, making it ideal for those who love gaming, streaming, or working on high-resolution graphics. It also supports 1080P video, allowing seamless connectivity across a range of devices. Because of this, you can experience a richer visual experience, whether you're watching your favorite shows on an HDTV or presenting spectacular visuals on a projector.
This cable features a robust construction that ensures long-lasting performance. With a length of 3 meters, it provides flexibility in connecting your devices without compromising on the signal quality. Also, the uni-directional design means you can connect your Displayport-enabled device to an HDMI display effortlessly. The high-quality materials used help reduce interference and ensure that your display remains vibrant and clear. Therefore, you can rely on this cable for all your essential connectivity needs.
The UGREEN cable is compatible with various devices including PCs, laptops, and projectors. It can easily connect your Displayport-enabled device to any HDMI display, making it extremely versatile. Whether you use it for work presentations or home entertainment setups, the UGREEN cable simplifies your connections. Because of its broad compatibility, you can maximize your usage from a single cable, making it a great investment for anyone needing reliable video output.

It is made of excellent quality, durable materials and its most sensitive parts have been additionally protected. The tin-plated copper cable ensures stable transmission and charging safety. product_name: gravastar mercury v75 he  usb wired gaming keyboard, true 8khz polling rate, hall effect magnetic switch technology, 16 modes multi-zone rgb lighting, ​hot-swappable design, semi-aluminum body
product_description:
Height: 16.34 in (415 mm)Width: 7.38 in (187.6 mm)Depth: 2.27 in (57.6 mm)Weight: 2.23 lb (1.01 kg)
​True 8kHz Polling Rate: Boasts an 8000Hz USB polling rate paired with 256kHz key-position scanning, reducing latency to a near-instantaneous 0.125ms.​GravaStar x Gateron Magnetic Jade Pro Switch: Engineered for 0.005mm precision with adjustable trigger depth (0.1mm–3.5mm) to eliminate lag and enhance control.​Adjustable Actuation Point: Customizable trigger depth (0.1mm increments, 0.1mm–3.5mm) to suit playstyles—shallow for fast combos, deep for precise inputs.​Dynamic Rapid Trigger: Dynamically adjusts activation/deactivation points based on key travel (not preset limits), enabling fluid rapid-fire key repeats.​Last Keystroke Prioritization (LKP) + Snap Click: Prioritizes the last-pressed key for smooth directional changes; resolves simultaneous presses by favoring deeper inputs.​Rapid Trigger Mode: Eliminates key "stiction" with instant reset on upward travel, enabling faster re-presses and input switching.​Semi-Aluminum Construction: Combines a sturdy aluminum frame (for durability) with a premium plastic base (lightweight, modern desk aesthetic).​Hot-Swappable Design: Allows switch swapping (no soldering) with magnetic Hall Effect switches; compatible with select TTC and Gateron models.​5-Layer Acoustic Foam: Minimizes keystroke vibrations for crisper sound and smoother typing feel.​16 Modes, Dual Systems, Multi-Zone RGB Lighting: Customizable 16 dynamic modes, dual-zone control (keys + ambient side lights), and adjustable hue/saturation/brightness. 
Operating System: Windows XP or Above/Mac OS
Connectivity: Wired

About this item

 Handmade Battle-Worn Crafting & Premium
Build - The Mercury K1 Pro features a unique, handmade Battle-worn yellow
finish with a sturdy aluminum alloy frame, combining durability and
portability. Its skeletal frame design not only looks stunning but also
stabilizes every keystroke, making it a perfect blend of art and functionality.
·        
Custom Kailh Speedy Mint
Linear Switches - Equipped with custom linear Speedy Mint Linear switches (45gf
actuation force, 1.2mm pre-travel), the K1 Pro delivers stealthy,
ultra-responsive keystrokes perfect for gaming and typing. With a 70-million
keystroke lifespan and smooth POK stems, these switches ensure durability and a
premium feel without the need for lubing.
·        
 Dual RGB Lighting & Pudding PBT Keycaps -
Elevate your setup with dual independent RGB lighting systems offering 16.8
million colors and 13 lighting modes. The south-facing backlit keys and stylish
Pudding PBT keycaps with dye-sublimation art ensure vibrant, customizable
lighting that enhances both aesthetics and visibility.
·        
8000mAh Battery &
Tri-Mode Connectivity - Stay powered for long gaming sessions with the massive
8000mAh rechargeable battery. The K1 Pro offers versatile tri-mode connectivity
(wired, Bluetooth, 2.4GHz wireless), ensuring seamless compatibility with PCs,
laptops, and other devices for gaming, work, or play.
·        
 Premium Typing Feel with Gasket-Mounted Design
- Experience a balanced and comfortable typing experience thanks to the
gasket-mounted FR4 plate and 5 layers of sound-dampening foam. The 75% compact
layout with 79 keys and a programmable control knob maximizes functionality
while saving desk space, making it ideal for gamers, typists, and programmers
alike.

product_name: poly sync 10 usb wired plug-and-play speakerphone , microsoft teams certified, noise & echo reduction, dual microphone array for windows & macos, ip64 dust & water-resistant microsoft, zoom
product_description:
Enjoy crystal clear calls from your laptop with the Poly Sync 10 All-in-One USB Speakerphone. Certified for Zoom and Microsoft Teams with wide application compatibility, this compact and slim speakerphone features a steerable two-microphone array with full-duplex audio that uses built-in noise and echo reduction to help ensure that call participants are heard. With a pickup range of about 5 feet, the Poly Sync 10 is ideal for rooms up to 10 x 10 feet.
Additionally, its speaker system includes a built-in amplifier with dual passive radiators, providing clarity and richness to everything from music to webinars and podcasts. The Poly Sync 10 is powered through its integrated USB-A cable and works with most Windows and Mac systems without needing to install additional software drivers. A convenient USB-C adapter is included. It is also IP65-rated for dust and water resistance, so you can take your calls or listen to music whether you're indoors or out. A 360° LED light bar indicates your call status.

Small and Ultra light: The DJI Mic Mini Transmitter is small and
ultralight, weighing only 10 g, [5] making it comfortable to wear and discreet.
With multiple wearing options like magnetic attachment and clip-on, it won't
weigh down your collar or flip outward, even on thin T-shirts, ensuring a more
aesthetically pleasing on-camera appearance.
All-in-One, Take It Anywhere: The compact DJI Mic
Mini features an innovative design for easy storage. The charging case can
neatly store two transmitters, one receiver, mobile phone adapters, and
windscreens. The windscreens on the transmitters do not need to be removed when
stored in the case. The entire set is convenient to use and easy to store.
Detail-Rich Sound:  DJI Mic Mini supports omnidirectional audio
recording. The receiver can pair with two transmitters simultaneously. Even
when recording multiple sound sources, the mic excels at reproducing
detail-rich sound, ensuring the audio you get is always high quality.
Two-Level Noise Cancelling:  DJI Mic Mini offers two noise cancellation
levels to suit different environments. The Basic level is perfect for quiet
indoor settings, reducing fan, air conditioning, and reverb noises while
preserving vocal clarity. The Strong level excels in noisy environments,
significantly cutting ambient noise for clearer vocals.
Automatic Limiting to Prevent Audio Clipping:  When automatic limiting is enabled, [4] DJI
Mic Mini automatically lowers the volume if the audio input is too high,
preventing clipping and ensuring reliable audio quality. This is especially
useful for content creators.
5-Level Gain Adjustment:  The gain can be quickly adjusted in five
levels using the dial on the receiver, making operation convenient and
efficient.
Mono and Stereo Recording: DJI Mic Mini supports both Mono
and Stereo (dual-channel) recording. Audio captured by the two transmitters can
be output separately or combined into a single track, providing greater
flexibility for post-production.
Safety Track, Extra Assurance: By enabling a safety track in
the DJI Mimo app, DJI Mic Mini can record in dual tracks. The main track
records at normal volume, while the second track records at 6 dB lower, helping
to protect your audio from issues like clipping and distortion. This ensures
you capture usable audio even with fluctuating volumes during live
performances.

product_name: cooler master caliber x2c (black) premium gaming chair w/ cool-in technology, breathable perforated cooler design, steel frame, ultra comfortable memory foam & pu, 4d armrest, up to 180° recline & 150kg max weight load
product_description:
POLAR ICE EXPEDITIONGet ready to One Hit Knock-out (OHKO) the competition from the comfort of your breezy Caliber X2C!
MADE FOR WORK & PLAYRace towards the future or chase your dreams – the X2C chair makes for the best companion. Stunning to look at with comfort and support at its finest.
CHOOSE YOUR STYLECaliber X2C is available in your choice of white-grey or black colorways.
COOL-IN TECHCaliber X2C feels 1-2°C cooler than a regular gaming chair. COOL-IN Technology enhances the overall comfortability of your workstation by reducing chair-to-player heat exchange and humidity build-up, which lead to sweatiness during long hours of gameplay.
THE COOLING EFFECTCOOL-IN Fabric Technology provides efficient cooling by extracting hot air from the body, passing it through the COOL-IN Fabric which helps mitigating hot temperatures by exhaling cool and dry air back onto the seat surface. this helps reduce body heat and allows sweat evaporation, heat convection, and makes your body feel cooler and dry.
FORMALDEHYDE FREEThe COOL-IN fabric is made from formaldehyde-free material. It is suitable for environmentally sensitive areas and everyone who wants to enjoy a healthy gaming experience.
Cat Scratch-proofThe COOL-IN Fabric Technology also provide extra benefits of cat scratch-proof and a dust repellent and easy-to-clean surface for daily usages.

product_name: cooler master caliber e1 gaming chair (black), plywood frame, high density foam & pu, fixed armrest, up to 135° recline & 120kg max weight load
product_description:
Caliber E1 features a design that is sleek and understated. For those who want a clean, simple aesthetic with minimal branding, the Caliber series gaming chairs are the perfect companion to your setup.
Freely adjust the sitting angle with the reclining backrest to find your perfect resting place. With a height adjustable gas lift the Caliber E1 helps to minimise fatigue and maximise the comfort of your game or work sessions.
The headrest and lumbar pillow will provide you with the best level of comfort to reduce back pain and alleviate neck strain.
Premium quality and design sets the E1 apart from the competition. The breathable PU material provides maximum comfort for all body types and keeps you feeling cool and energised at all times of the day.
The durable and extremely strong Class 4 Gas Lift can withstand a max load of up to 120kg (264.5lbs). The gas lift cylinder enhances the comfort of your sitting experience by providing reliable height adjustments every time.
Keep your chair spotless even longer with the built-in splash and dust resistance. The high-quality materials used in the Caliber E1 chair are made to repel and help block out water and dust particles for a cleaner workspace.
With the tilt tension mechanism, the backrest can be reclined from 90° to 135° to meet all your needs.
